_meta.description: 90-second horizontal brand film. Three-act structure with titled chapters. Room for a deep emotional arc: world-building → craft/belief → emotional peak → brand resolution. Prestige format for campaigns, festivals, and brand channels.

sections.name: Atmosphere
sections.notes: Silent open — room tone or ambient only. Establishes world and tone with 1–2 unhurried frames.

sections.name: Chapter-1-title
sections.notes: Optional chapter title on screen (e.g. 'I. The Making'). 2 atmospheric shots. Music begins quietly if relevant.

sections.name: Act-1
sections.notes: The world and the people. Observational documentary register. 4 shots at 5s each. Build familiarity.

sections.name: Music entry
sections.notes: Pivot moment — a look, an action, a discovery. Music swells or enters fully. The film changes register here.

sections.name: Chapter-2
sections.notes: The craft, vision, or product. More dynamic. Music fully established. 4 shots.

sections.name: Emotional peak
sections.notes: The film's most emotional moment. Slowest cuts. Music at its most expressive. 2–3 shots of maximum 7s each.

sections.name: Brand statement
sections.notes: Manifesto or brand belief statement on screen. Near-still clip. Music resolves — a quiet cadence.

sections.name: End card
sections.notes: Logo + URL on black. 2s of silence after music ends. True ending.

clips.notes: Near-silent. Room tone only. One powerful frame — place, texture, or light.
Atmospheric support for the chapter title card. Slow drift or completely still.
Second frame in the opening chapter. Environment or material detail.
Wide observational shot. The humans in the brand's world.
Craft or process — hands, tools, materials being shaped.
Portrait. The face of the brand — maker, founder, or muse. Natural light.
Intimate environmental detail. Textures, surfaces, the physical world of the brand.
The decisive moment. Music swells or enters here. A look to camera, a product appears, a door opens.
Brand's largest vision — aspirational wide shot. The 'why' made visible.
The product as an object of beauty. Studio or environmental hero shot.
People sharing the brand experience. Connection and belonging.
The defining detail that only this brand makes. Craft signature.
The most emotionally resonant image in the entire film. Slow. Let it breathe.
Human connection moment. A gesture, a smile, a look — whatever carries the most feeling.
Resolution frame — a sense of arrival or peace. Leads into the brand statement.
Near-still or very slow. The manifesto text is the hero. Neutral, calm tones.
Black or deep brand color. Logo and URL. Music fades to silence.

music.notes: Music enters at second 35 (Music entry section) with 2s fade-in. Reaches peak during Emotional peak section. Resolves quietly under Brand statement. Silent before end card ends.

text_overlays.text: PLACEHOLDER: Brand manifesto or belief statement
